mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sport_course_rating_log ( course_id, user_id, score, comment ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{userId}, #{score}, #{comment} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = VALUES(score), comment = VALUES(comment), created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO sport_course_rating ( course_id, rating_avg, rating_count ) SELECT #{courseId}, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(score), 0), 2), COUNT(1) FROM sport_course_rating_log WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rating_avg = VALUES(rating_avg), rating_count = VALUES(rating_count)
mapper.select: SELECT sc.id AS course_id, IFNULL(scr.rating_avg, 0.00) AS rating_avg, IFNULL(scr.rating_count, 0) AS rating_count, rl.score AS user_score FROM sport_course sc LEFT JOIN sport_course_rating scr ON scr.course_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN sport_course_rating_log rl ON rl.course_id = sc.id AND rl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE sc.id = #{courseId} LIMIT 1
